results.description: Explore how BTS fans' relentless rumors shattered a girl's life, revealing the dark side of celebrity gossip and its real‐world impact. The post Dangers of celeb rumors: How BTS fans ruined a girl’s life over Jungkook appeared first on Film Daily .
